notes: Captures productCreate with two productOptions that each submit multiple values. Shopify keeps all submitted values in optionValues, marks only the first value of each option as variant-backed, and creates one initial variant for the first-value tuple rather than the full cartesian product.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates a stable local product GID for the staged session; Shopify returns the dev-store product GID.
Product option IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Variant IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product GID.
The downstream proxy read returns locally generated product option IDs.
The downstream proxy read returns locally generated product option value IDs.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated variant ID.
